heading: Omitted
label: 500h Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized Secretary to grant administrative powers to organizations of natives, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 950 Stat. 901
